post_processing: local chroma-key removal, resized to 1024x1024 RGBA, derived platform icons regenerated
prompt: Generate a refined version of the current fox-whale app logo. Keep the first new logo's composition: fox face on top, whale body facing left on the bottom, small single whale eye on the left-facing whale, whale tail curling up on the right, and the fox and whale fused into one cute emblem. Most important change: make the whale portion match the in-app whale mascot colors better, with a richer bright royal blue body, pale cool white-to-light-blue belly, glossy blue highlights, slightly darker blue shadowing, a rounded flipper, right-side tail, and subtle vertical belly rib lines. Keep the fox close to the first new logo and app fox: rounded orange head, pointed ears with dark tips, cream inner ears and cheek/muzzle band, big glossy brown eyes, small black nose, and gentle happy smile. No front-facing whale, two large faces, text, musical notes, props, hats, signs, watermarks, or extra animals.
style_notes: fox-whale fusion mascot using the preferred left-facing whale composition with whale colors corrected toward the in-app whale asset
